creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 252036
patch for multimedia/openshot

Another addition of a scraping that is necessary when using the development version. For when a version like v3.2.1-2-gae767340
However, I suspect that even if this is added, updates to pkg-plist will be included...

Also, there is an extra file overwrite dialog just before encoding, but that is left unchanged in this version.
And I haven't been able to test it in combination with ffmpeg-7 yet.
